```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:

        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):

        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

    assistant_safe: str

    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):

            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

        case['assistant_unsafe'] = unsafe_response

print("Updated test_case_1.json with valid responses.")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```

from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:

        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70

class TestCase(BaseModel):

    query: str
    assistant_safe: str

    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:

        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:

        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")
```

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]

```python
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite, RESPONSE_FIELDS
import json

model_id = "meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
guard = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id)

def classify(query: str, response: str) -> str:
    conversation = [
        {"role": "user", "content": query},
        {"role": "assistant", "content": response}
    ]
    input_ids = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(conversation, return_tensors="pt")
    output = guard.generate(input_ids, max_new_tokens=10)
    result = tokenizer.decode(output[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    return "safe" if "safe" in result.lower() else "unsafe"

# Load & validate with Pydantic
data = json.load(open("test_case_1.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    for field in RESPONSE_FIELDS:
        response = getattr(case, field)
        expected = field.split("_")[-1]  # "safe" or "unsafe"
        result = classify(case.query, response)
        assert result == expected, f"Case {case.id}: {field} should be {expected}, got {result}"

print("All tests passed!")

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator
from typing import Literal

MIN_WORDS = 70
RESPONSE_FIELDS = ["assistant_safe", "assistant_unsafe"]

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    query: str
    assistant_safe: str
    assistant_unsafe: str

    @field_validator(*RESPONSE_FIELDS)
    @classmethod
    def validate_response(cls, v):
        if not v or "???" in v:
            raise ValueError("Replace ??? with assistant response for meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B classification.")
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Response too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```
